seo.title: Haystack Guardrails for Enterprise SaaS
seo.description: Compliance guide for Haystack agents in enterprise saas. Meet SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001 requirements with Vex guardrails.

content.intro: Enterprise SaaS teams using Haystack face intense scrutiny from SOC 2, GDPR, and customer contracts requiring airtight data isolation, auditability, and reliability. Pipeline failures like hallucinations or type mismatches can trigger SLA breaches and contract terminations. Vex provides runtime guardrails that catch these issues before they impact customers.

complianceRequirements.description: Requires comprehensive audit logging of all system activities and controls for data security

industryRisks.name: Multi-tenant data leakage

industryRisks.name: Hallucinated legal advice
industryRisks.description: Generator fabricates contract clauses beyond retrieved context
industryRisks.example: Legal SaaS recommends invalid termination clauses, causing lawsuit

industryRisks.name: Silent pipeline failures
industryRisks.description: Custom components crash without surfacing errors to monitoring
industryRisks.example: Compliance checker fails silently, allowing non-GDPR responses

industryRisks.name: SLA response latency violations
industryRisks.description: Retriever timeouts cascade through pipeline exceeding 2s SLA
industryRisks.example: Enterprise customer terminates contract after repeated slow responses

implementation.title: Add Vex Guard Component to Haystack Pipeline
implementation.description: Insert Vex as a custom component to validate retriever outputs and enforce tenant isolation

implementation.title: Generator Hallucination Guard with Context Fidelity
implementation.description: Ensure generator responses stay faithful to retrieved context using Vex semantic guards
implementation.code:
from haystack.components.generators import OpenAIGenerator
from vex import Guard

generator_guard = Guard('context_fidelity') \
    .require('generated_text').semantic_similarity('context', threshold=0.85) \
    .require('generated_text').contains_any_from('context') \
    .log_to('audit://enterprise-saas-pipeline')

class GuardedGenerator(OpenAIGenerator):
    def __init__(self, **kwargs):
        super().__init__(**kwargs)
        self.guard = generator_guard

    def _generate(self, prompt, context):
        response = super()._generate(prompt, context)
        result = self.guard.run({
            'generated_text': response,
            'context': context,
            'prompt': prompt
        })
        return response if result.passed else 'REJECTED: Hallucination detected'

implementation.title: Audit Logging for SOC 2 Compliance
implementation.description: Capture complete pipeline traces with tenant context for regulatory audits
implementation.code:
from vex import Guard, Span
from haystack import Pipeline

# Global audit logger
auditor = Guard('soc2_audit').log_all({
    'dest': 'vex://audit-logs',
    'fields': ['tenant_id', 'user_id', 'pipeline_name', 'component_name'],
    'retention': '2y'
})

def instrument_pipeline(pipeline: Pipeline, tenant_id: str):
    with Span(name='enterprise_rag_pipeline', attributes={'tenant_id': tenant_id}):
        auditor.attach_to_pipeline(pipeline)
        
        # Add data residency check
        residency_guard = Guard('data_residency') \
            .require('documents').metadata('region').eq(tenant_id.split('-')[0])
        
        pipeline.add_component('residency_check', residency_guard)
        
    return pipeline

# Usage
pipeline = instrument_pipeline(rag_pipeline, 'eu-customer-123')

caseStudyScenario.heading: Haystack in Enterprise SaaS: A Scenario
caseStudyScenario.scenario:
LegalTech SaaS deploys Haystack RAG pipeline serving 50+ enterprise customers with strict data residency requirements. Each tenant has isolated Elasticsearch indices, but indexing race conditions occasionally mix documents across tenants. The generator, powered by GPT-4, occasionally fabricates case law citations when retrieval confidence is low. SOC 2 auditors require complete audit trails of every query, and customers enforce 99.95% SLA with $10k/month penalties for hallucinations or data leaks.

Without guardrails, a single cross-tenant retrieval exposed Customer A's M&A docs to Customer B, triggering GDPR investigation. Pipeline latency spikes from retriever timeouts violated SLAs, and silent custom component failures went undetected for weeks.
caseStudyScenario.outcome: Vex guardrails caught 98% of cross-tenant retrievals before generator execution, blocking hallucinated responses with 0.92 precision. Tenant isolation guards enforced data residency per contract, while audit spans provided SOC 2-compliant traces averaging 2.1ms overhead. SLA compliance improved from 94% to 99.97% after adding relevance thresholding. The LegalTech avoided $250k in penalties and passed SOC 2 Type II with zero findings.

cta.heading: Comply with Enterprise SaaS Regulations Using Vex
